name: list_pools
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.pools.every(p => typeof p.id === 'string' && typeof p.previewAprPct === 'number' && Number.isFinite(p.previewAprPct))
output.ok === false || output.result.pools.every(p => typeof p.minStake === 'number' && p.minStake >= 0)
_note: list_pools is a PURE catalog READ (no actor). Always returns the flex/core/growth pools with a preview APR clamped to each pool's cap. months defaults to 12 and is internally clamped [1,60] so even a poisoned value yields a finite previewAprPct (catalog enum, no write to guard).
